ValidationRule.description: Ensures each stage can move only forward one step or to Closed Lost.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISCHANGED(StageName),
NOT( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost") ),
CASE(TEXT(StageName), "Opportunity Qualification", 1, "Scoping and Value Proposition Development", 2, "Proposal Creation", 3, "Contracting", 4, "Contract Signature", 5, "Closed Won", 6, "Closed Lost", 99, /* special, already allowed above */ 0 ) > CASE(TEXT(PRIORVALUE(StageName)), "Opportunity Qualification", 1, "Scoping and Value Proposition Development", 2, "Proposal Creation", 3, "Contracting", 4, "Contract Signature", 5, "Closed Won", 6, "Closed Lost", 99, 0 ) + 1 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can’t skip stages. Please move to the next stage in order.
